name: JoAi: Update Blueprint

description.en: Edit an existing blueprint's name, description, or configuration.
description.de: Bearbeite den Namen, die Beschreibung oder die Konfiguration eines bestehenden Blueprints.
description.es: Edit an existing blueprint's name, description, or configuration.
description.fr: Edit an existing blueprint's name, description, or configuration.
description.ro: Edit an existing blueprint's name, description, or configuration.
description.it: Edit an existing blueprint's name, description, or configuration.

bot: Use this when the user wants to refine or correct an existing blueprint. If the user refers to a blueprint by name, list blueprints first to find the matching ID.

inputs.name: Blueprint ID

description.en: The ID of the blueprint to update
description.de: Die ID des zu aktualisierenden Blueprints
description.es: The ID of the blueprint to update
description.fr: The ID of the blueprint to update
description.ro: The ID of the blueprint to update
description.it: The ID of the blueprint to update

inputs.bot: The blueprint hash ID. If the user refers to a blueprint by name, list blueprints first to find the matching ID.
A new concise name for this blueprint, if the user wants to rename it.

inputs.name: Description

description.en: Updated description of what this blueprint does
description.de: Aktualisierte Beschreibung, was dieser Blueprint tut
description.es: Updated description of what this blueprint does
description.fr: Updated description of what this blueprint does
description.ro: Updated description of what this blueprint does
description.it: Updated description of what this blueprint does

inputs.bot: An updated explanation of this blueprint's purpose and when to use it.

inputs.name: Config

description.en: Updated configuration or steps (JSON or text)
description.de: Aktualisierte Konfiguration oder Schritte (JSON oder Text)
description.es: Updated configuration or steps (JSON or text)
description.fr: Updated configuration or steps (JSON or text)
description.ro: Updated configuration or steps (JSON or text)
description.it: Updated configuration or steps (JSON or text)

inputs.bot: Updated structured configuration, steps, or instructions for this blueprint.
